## Agent

- Name and homepage:
- Does it speak MCP today? (yes / not yet / planned)

## Rules file

- Where does this agent read its rules / system instructions from (user scope)?
- Where does it read project-scope rules?
- Format (Markdown / YAML / JSON / TOML)?

## MCP configuration

- Where does it store MCP server entries?
- Format (`mcpServers` JSON / `mcp_servers` TOML table / something else)?
- Is there an `<agent> mcp add` CLI command?

## Detection

- Which directory or file confirms the agent is installed locally?
